goblin-deal.title: A Suspicious Offer
goblin-deal.description: A goblin scout, notably clean for his kind, sidles up to you from behind a stump. He speaks quickly, gesturing toward a cloth bag that clinks suspiciously.

choices.label: Take the deal
choices.consequence: +15 crystals, but lose 8 HP (he bites you on the way out)

choices.label: Trade him a card tip for info
choices.consequence: Add a common card to your collection

choices.label: Chase him off
choices.consequence: He runs. You feel smart but slightly bored.

wanderer.title: The Wandering Scholar
wanderer.description: A robed scholar sits cross-legged on a boulder, annotating a crackling tome. He glances up without surprise. "Ah. Another one of Jarv's campaigns. Sit."

choices.label: Ask about rare tactics
choices.consequence: Add a rare card to your collection

ambush-merchant.title: Waylaid Merchant
ambush-merchant.description: A merchant's cart lists sideways in a ditch, one wheel spinning. The merchant waves you over frantically. "Help me up and I'll make it worth your while."

choices.label: Take what you need from the cart
choices.consequence: Add an uncommon card to your collection (ethically complicated)

choices.label: Leave him be
choices.consequence: You are definitely the villain in his story.

supply-cache.title: Supply Cache
supply-cache.description: A Citadel supply depot, hastily abandoned. Crates lie open and torn sacks spill their contents.

choices.label: Pocket something useful
choices.consequence: You find an uncommon card among the spoils

choices.label: Leave quickly
choices.consequence: Nothing of use remains — you move on.

offering.label: Leave an offering
offering.consequence: The shrine accepts your gift — restored 12 HP

offering.label: Leave an offering
offering.consequence: The shrine is silent. Nothing happens.

offering.label: Leave an offering
offering.consequence: Something drains your offering — lose 5 HP

offering.label: Leave an offering
offering.consequence: The shrine returns your kindness with a glass marble — added to inventory

offering.label: Leave an offering
offering.consequence: A lucky charm appears at the altar's base — added to inventory

pray.label: Pray for strength
pray.consequence: A card materialises from the glow — uncommon

pray.label: Pray for strength
pray.consequence: The magic guides your wounds — restored 8 HP

pray.label: Pray for strength
pray.consequence: The shrine tests you — lose 10 HP

pray.label: Pray for strength
pray.consequence: The shrine presses a mystery key into your palm — added to inventory

pray.label: Pray for strength
pray.consequence: An ancient foreign coin materialises in your hand — added to inventory

take.label: Pocket the ritual stones
take.consequence: You grab them and run — +18 crystals, lose 8 HP

take.label: Pocket the ritual stones
take.consequence: A common card falls from the stones

take.label: Pocket the ritual stones
take.consequence: The stones crumble to dust. Nothing.

take.label: Pocket the ritual stones
take.consequence: The shrine curses you — lose 15 HP

take.label: Pocket the ritual stones
take.consequence: One of the stones is a smooth, satisfying rock — added to inventory

rest.label: Rest in the shelter
rest.consequence: Something bites you in the night — lose 6 HP

rest.label: Rest in the shelter
rest.consequence: You find a pouch under the floorboards — +14 crystals

rest.label: Rest in the shelter
rest.consequence: You wake to find a pretty leaf pressed against your face — added to inventory

rest.label: Rest in the shelter
rest.consequence: Something small and magnetic rolls under your hand in the dark — added to inventory

search.label: Search the armory
search.consequence: An uncommon card hidden behind a loose brick

search.label: Search the armory
search.consequence: A rare weapon contract — add a rare card

search.label: Search the armory
search.consequence: A rusted trap springs — lose 10 HP

search.label: Search the armory
search.consequence: You find an instruction manual for an appliance you don't own — added to inventory

search.label: Search the armory
search.consequence: A spare button rolls out of a helmet — added to inventory

climb.label: Climb the watchtower
climb.consequence: Good vantage point — +12 crystals from spotted supply cache

climb.label: Climb the watchtower
climb.consequence: A common card is wedged in the battlements

climb.label: Climb the watchtower
climb.consequence: Nothing up there. Wind. Old regrets.

climb.label: Climb the watchtower
climb.consequence: An old cassette tape is jammed in the bell — added to inventory

climb.label: Climb the watchtower
climb.consequence: A fridge magnet ('Visit [REDACTED]!') is stuck to the iron door — added to inventory
